name: Cheesy Salmon Supper
recipeIngredient: 1 can (8 oz) cream of mushroom soup
3/4 cup milk or 1/2 cup cream and 1/2 cup milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except the soup and milk.
2. Bake in a loaf tin or casserole dish at 350°F for 40-45 minutes.
3. Remove from the pan.
4. Combine the soup and milk, heat and pour over the loaf as a sauce.
